description_long: This is a stone memorial obelisk with a rectangular base constructed from stacked, weathered stone blocks. The front features a prominent sculptural relief of heraldic shields, crests, and a large ornate crown at the top, all rendered in a classical style. Below the relief, an inscription in German is engraved into the stone, commemorating victims of both world wars. The sides and rear of the structure are plain, showing the rough texture and mossy discoloration of the stonework. The base is surrounded by a patch of ground with sparse grass and dirt, suggesting an outdoor setting. The overall appearance is solemn and monumental, with significant decorative and commemorative elements on the front face.
description: A weathered stone memorial obelisk with ornate heraldic reliefs and a German inscription on the front, set on a rectangular base with mossy stonework and sparse grass around it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate crown, heraldic shields, and the German inscription engraved on the stone face.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the relief and the plain, blocky stonework of the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, mossy stone blocks and the back of the sculptural relief.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the thickness of the structure and the continuation of the rough stone texture.
attribute_inscription: The front face bears an engraved German inscription: 'DEN OPFERN BEIDER WELTKRIEGE', which translates to 'To the victims of both world wars'. The text is in uppercase, block-style letters, and is clearly legible.
attribute_ornamentation: The upper front features elaborate sculptural reliefs of heraldic shields, crests, and a large ornate crown, all in a classical, detailed style. These elements are concentrated above the inscription.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular platform made of stacked, weathered stone blocks, with some moss and discoloration. It is broad and flat, providing stability and a sense of permanence.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is not a traditional pointed obelisk but is instead topped with a large, intricately carved crown, flanked by sculpted shields and crests, forming a decorative and symbolic capstone.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a patch of ground with sparse grass and dirt, suggesting an outdoor placement. No fences, statues, or additional objects are immediately adjacent.
